sections.hero_title: Fitness tracking, AI-assisted progress summaries, and expert services in one platform.
sections.hero_description: Designed for users who want to record workouts, monitor progress, and receive guided support. Supports free users, premium users, expert users, and administrators.

sections.section_description: Highlights the main platform capabilities that can be edited by administrators.

items.title: Start tracking your training
items.description: Create an account to record workouts, receive AI summaries, monitor progress, and browse expert support.

items.title: Apply as a verified expert
items.description: Offer coaching, training, nutrition, or recovery services to users who need specialised guidance.

sections.title: FAQ
sections.section_description: Answers common questions visitors may have before registering, subscribing, or requesting expert support.

items.question: Can I use Wise Workout for free?
items.answer: Yes. Free users can log workouts, view basic workout history, browse verified experts, and access limited AI progress summaries.

items.question: What does the premium plan add?
items.answer: Premium adds unlimited AI progress summaries, personalised plan suggestions, advanced progress statistics, priority reminders, and premium support.

items.question: How do expert services work?
items.answer: Users can browse featured experts by category and request paid coaching, nutrition, recovery, or specialist event support as separate add-ons.

items.question: Can administrators update this landing page?
items.answer: Yes. Section text, feature records, statistics, expert profiles, pricing details, testimonials, FAQs, and contact content can be managed from database records.

sections.contact_subheading: Need help before joining Wise Workout?
sections.contact_description: Send a message to the team for support, partnership enquiries, or questions about expert services.
